lines.english: He Himself is the bow, and He Himself is the archer.
He Himself is all-wise, beautiful and all-knowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਕਸਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਲੈ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aape kis hee kas bakhase aape de lai bhaaee he |8|
lines.english: You Yourself test and forgive. You Yourself give and take, O Siblings of Destiny. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤਾ ਬਕਤਾ ਸੁਣਤਾ ਸੋਈ ਆਪੇ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: kahataa bakataa sunataa soee aape banat banaaee he |9|
lines.english: He is the speaker, the orator and the listener. He Himself made what is made. ||9||
Air is the Guru, and water is known to be the father.
The womb of the great mother earth gives birth to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਦੁਇ ਦਾਈ ਦਾਇਆ ਜਗੁ ਖੇਲੈ ਖੇਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: rain dinas due daaee daaeaa jag khelai khelaaee he |10|
lines.english: Night and day are the two nurses, male and female; the world plays in this play. ||10||
You Yourself are the fish, and You Yourself are the net.
You Yourself are the Yogi, and You Yourself are the enjoyer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਜਗਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਜੈਸੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: sarab jeea jag jot tumaaree jaisee prabh furamaaee he |11|
lines.english: Your Light fills all the beings of the world; they walk according to Your Command, O God. ||11||
You Yourself are the cows, and You yourself are their keeper.
You Yourself are the reveller; You form the supreme Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੀ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aape vebaanee nirankaaree nirbhau taarree laaee he |12|
lines.english: You Yourself are speechless, formless and fearless, absorbed in the primal ecstasy of deep meditation. ||12||
The sources of creation and speech are contained within You, Lord.
All that is seen, is coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਸਾਹ ਸਚੇ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: seee saah sache vaapaaree satigur boojh bujhaaee he |13|
lines.english: They are the true bankers and traders, whom the True Guru has inspired to understand. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਫਰਿਓ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਤੂ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: afario veparavaahu sadaa too naa tis til na tamaaee he |14|
lines.english: You are beyond our grasp, and forever independent. You do not have even an iota of greed. ||14||
The Word of the Shabad is understood through the Perfect True Guru.
The True Lord is overflowing with all powers.
Birth and death are meaningless, for those

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਵਰਦਾਤਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aape mukat tripat varadaataa bhagat bhaae man bhaaee he |15|
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of liberation, satisfaction and blessings, to those devotees who love Him in their minds. ||15||
who enjoy the sublime celestial essence of the Shabad within their minds.
He Himself is immaculate; by contact with the Guru, spiritual wisdom is obtained.
Whatever is seen, shall merge into You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਚੈ ਮੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak neech bhikhiaa dar jaachai mai deejai naam vaddaaee he |16|1|
lines.english: Nanak, the lowly, begs for charity at Your Door; please, bless him with the glorious greatness of Your Name. ||16||1||
Maaroo, First Mehl:
He Himself is the earth, the mythical bull which supports it and the Akaashic ethers.
The True Lord Himself reveals His Glorious Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jatee satee santokhee aape aape kaar kamaaee he |1|
lines.english: He Himself is celibate, chaste and contented; He Himself is the Doer of deeds. ||1||
No one can erase the Inscription of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae aape aape de vaddiaaee he |2|
lines.english: He Himself is the Doer, the Cause of causes; He Himself is the One who bestows glorious greatness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੋ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis karanaa so kar kar vekhai |
lines.english: He who created the creation, beholds what He has created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਘਰ ਜੋਹਹਿ ਘਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਲਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: par ghar joheh ghar nahee bhaaleh |
lines.english: It looks into the homes of others, but does not search its own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਨਗਰੁ ਢਹੈ ਢਹਿ ਢੇਰੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਪਤਿ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa nagar dtahai dteh dteree bin sabadai pat jaaee he |3|
lines.english: The body-village crumbles into dust; without the Word of the Shabad, one's honor is lost. ||3||
The five thieves cause the fickle consciousness to waver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਤੁਧ ਹੀ ਜੇਹੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਬਾਲ ਸਖਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo tudh seveh se tudh hee jehe nirbhau baal sakhaaee he |4|
lines.english: Those who serve You, become just like You; O Fearless Lord, You are their best friend from infancy. ||4||
One who realizes the Lord through the Guru, comprehends the three worlds.
He subdues his desires, and struggles with his mind.
You Yourself are the heavenly realms, this world and the nether regions of the underworld.
You Yourself are the embodiment of light, forever young.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਟਾ ਬਿਕਟ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ਸਰੂਪੀ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਕਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jattaa bikatt bikaraal saroopee roop na rekhiaa kaaee he |5|
lines.english: With matted hair, and a horrible, dreadful form, still, You have no form or feature. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis maat pitaa sut bhraataa |
lines.english: He has no mother, father, child or brother.
The Vedas and the Bible do not know the mystery of God.
I have grown weary of making so many friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਸੈਲ ਉਪਾਇ ਸਮਾਏ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖਣਾ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sagale sail upaae samaae alakh na lakhanaa jaaee he |6|
lines.english: He created all the mountains, and levels them again; the Unseen Lord cannot be seen. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਨਾਥੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਉ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sur nar naath saahib sabhanaa sir bhaae milai bhau jaaee he |7|
lines.english: God is the Supreme Lord and Master of all the angels and mortal beings; blessed with His Love, their fear is dispelled. ||7||
No one can rid me of my sins and mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bin naavai mai avar na deesai naavahu gat mit paaee he |8|
lines.english: I cannot see anything except the Name. Through the Name comes salvation and merit. ||8||
You Yourself make them stray, and You teach them again.
He puts back on the Path those who have wandered and strayed.
